Flow.interviewLabel: 137届广交会客户来访需求提报
Flow.label: 137届广交会客户来访需求提报

screens.name: p_51c7fbfc_b238_4f22_9b21_ef81574eebc9
screens.label: Page 1

validationRule.errorMessage: The format of your response is invalid. Try entering your response in a different format.

fields.name: q_243f3b99_feeb_4b0b_9e74_e556279fc146
fields.fieldText:
客户所在公司名（如有多个公司，请分行填写）

Name of the Client's Company (if there are multiple companies, please fill in separate lines)

fields.name: q_578b58d9_fa8a_452a_a14d_6790cfc2ebcc
fields.fieldText:
预计邀请客户数量（人）

Estimated Number of Invited Clients (persons)

fields.name: q_ab58325f_4f08_4a3e_9416_53f0960dd44c
fields.fieldText:
是否参加过广交会

Whether Attended the Canton Fair Before

fields.name: q_edef481d_198e_42b1_bbd6_7e342483ea67
fields.fieldText:
本次来访目的

Purpose of This Visit

fields.name: q_28528612_df88_40da_aaeb_1962556a6d34
fields.fieldText:
合作品类（如TV, Laser TV, REF, AC等）

Categories of Cooperation (such as TV, Laser TV, REF, AC, etc.)

fields.name: q_0984d190_7726_4b60_8d0d_09452c15f7b1
fields.fieldText:
客户2024年合作规模

Client's Cooperation Scale in 2024

fields.name: q_d1b74026_4e36_44ea_84c0_17599ec728b1
fields.fieldText:
客户与公司合作年限

Years of Cooperation Between the Client and the Company

fields.name: q_c351fdb8_e660_48d0_b3db_32370bcc88ae
fields.fieldText:
您在邀请客户过程中可能遇到的困难或需要公司提供的支持

Difficulties You May Encounter in the Process of Inviting Clients or Support Needed from the Company

screens.pausedText: To pick up where you left off, refresh this page, or open the survey again.
